name: Iluka Resources Limited
description: Iluka Resources Limited is an international critical minerals company with a major presence in the global mineral sands industry. Headquartered in Perth, Australia, the company is a leading producer of zircon and high-grade titanium dioxide products, including rutile and synthetic rutile. Iluka is also developing a significant position in rare earth elements, highlighted by the construction of Australia's first fully integrated rare earths refinery at Eneabba. The company's operations and projects span Australia and Africa, focusing on delivering sustainable value through the exploration, mining, and processing of essential minerals used in a wide range of industrial and technology applications.
